positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial fox guardian (kitsune) sitting atop a crescent moon. The fox has graceful, flowing tails and large, alert eyes. It is surrounded by swirling nebula dust and stylized stars in deep indigo, vibrant gold, and cosmic teal. The overall composition must be symmetrical and highly detailed, resembling a clean vector design with strong silhouettes and high contrast. Include scattered floral elements (like mandalas or stylized cherry blossoms) orbiting the central figure. Flat design elements are preferred, with a slight watercolor texture for depth. High-detail, printable, suitable for apparel.
negative: blur, fuzzy, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signature, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, photorealistic, messy, distracting elements
